summary: Tested reported bugs for Gratis Factuur & Offerte Generator: 1) Klanten not showing after creation, 2) Bedrijfsgegevens not auto-filling on invoice page. Backend API is working correctly - all 6 tests passed. Frontend testing shows mixed results - sometimes the UI updates correctly, sometimes there's a race condition where the refresh doesn't show newly created klanten immediately.

ui_bugs.issue: Intermittent race condition - after creating a klant, the loadKlanten() function is called but sometimes returns stale data from the database (newly created klant not included)

tests.notes: Login works correctly with demo credentials
Returns user profile with all bedrijfsgegevens fields

klanten_page.create_klant_modal: PASS - Modal opens and form works
klanten_page.immediate_refresh: INTERMITTENT - Sometimes shows new klant, sometimes doesn't

invoice_page.klanten_dropdown: PASS - Shows all klanten in dropdown

action_items: The intermittent klant refresh issue may be related to MongoDB write concern or a race condition between POST response and subsequent GET
Consider adding a small delay before loadKlanten() call, OR use the response from POST directly to update the state
Alternative fix: Add the new klant to state optimistically when POST succeeds, then verify with GET
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API is correctly implemented - POST /api/invoice/klanten creates klant and returns success
Frontend GratisFactuurKlanten.js correctly calls loadKlanten() after successful creation (line 72)
The issue appears to be timing-related - loadKlanten() GET request may execute before MongoDB fully commits the new record
Route /gratis-factuur does NOT exist - correct route is /invoice for public invoice generator
The bedrijfsgegevens pre-fill feature IS working correctly when accessed via /invoice route after login
seed_data_creation: Created test klanten during testing, cleaned up afterwards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API for Gratis Factuur system is fully functional. The reported bugs appear to be intermittent on the frontend - sometimes the klanten list refreshes correctly after creation, sometimes it doesn't. Bedrijfsgegevens auto-fill IS working when user is logged in and accesses /invoice page. The route /gratis-factuur does not exist - use /invoice instead.

klanten_not_showing.root_cause: Likely a race condition where loadKlanten() GET request executes before MongoDB fully commits the new klant document
evidence: Backend POST /api/invoice/klanten returns success with created klant
Subsequent GET /api/invoice/klanten sometimes returns stale data
Browser console shows FETCH requests happening correctly
Manual page refresh shows the klant was created
klanten_not_showing.mitigation: Consider using optimistic UI update - add the new klant to state directly from POST response, then verify with GET

bedrijfsgegevens_not_prefilling.root_cause: NOT REPRODUCED - This bug was tested and found to be WORKING correctly in the preview environment
evidence: Frontend /invoice page correctly calls loadUserSettings() on mount (line 116-148)
Screenshot shows 'Demo Bedrijf' and email pre-filled correctly
bedrijfsgegevens_not_prefilling.mitigation: No action needed - feature is working
